title: Limited Enchant Levels II
description: Limits the max enchant levels to two.
body:
# Limited Encant Levels:

This datapack is aimed at server owners that are intrested in hosting a life series. 

Limited Enchants II limits the level enchants a player can enchant too (This datapack limiting to level 2).
EX. Sharpness 5 is the max, this datapack will change it to Sharpness 2.
    Same goes for Protection: Protection 4 Max -> Protection 2 Max.

**If you notice any bugs or enchantments missing please join my discord linked to report bugs. **

Thank you so much for downloading!
